channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How leaders can make ethical choices when the rules fall short
item.description: We live in a time when our expectations for ethical business practices are no longer predictable. Global regulation, along with ideas around standards...

item.title: Why Block’s 4,000 Layoffs Are Hitting Harder
item.description: Techies are getting super cynical about the tech industry.

item.title: This grocery chain is offering free GLP-1 starter kits
item.description: With GLP-1 use on the rise in the U.S., one grocery store chain made a starter kit for first-time customers that could help capture a higher percentag...

item.title: Asia’s founders are spending more money on AI tools, with use of some coding tools rising by more than four times
item.description: Spending on AI tools by founders rose 20% last year, according to Aspire, a Singapore-based fintech firm.

item.title: I tested 200 edtech tools. These are the ones worth using
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools , a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. I tested more tha...

item.title: Want to live forever? Meta patented an AI model that would keep your profile active after you die
item.description: Meta’s new AI patent means your dead uncle could still comment fire emojis on your posts, but experts say this could undermine grief and closure.

item.title: JPMorgan’s CEO Jamie Dimon reveals the career goal he adopted when he was just a 28-year-old assistant: Do not speak unless you can add value
item.description: Before Jamie Dimon was the billionaire boss of JPMorgan, he set himself a surprisingly modest rule: don’t talk—it propelled him to a CFO role by 30

item.title: Duolingo Stock Is Falling Off a Cliff, Continuing a Dramatic Collapse. You Can’t Just Blame That ‘AI First’ Memo
item.description: Investors are dumping Duolingo after it released underwhelming guidance for 2026. Shares have seen their value slashed since their high point in May 2...

item.title: 1 In 3 Americans Struggle to Sleep. Scientists Say These Habits Help Most
item.description: It’s all about the bedtime routine.

item.title: These Discounts Are a Personal Finance Goldmine Hiding in Plain Sight
item.description: Individuals who ignore savings opportunities from businesses such as GoodRX and Jewel-Osco do so at their peril.

item.title: Goldman Sachs vice chair on the hidden trap of senior management: ‘pretty soon the bosses are no longer watching you’
item.description: Before returning as vice chair, Rob Kaplan served on the faculty of the Harvard Business School and as president of the Dallas Federal Reserve.

item.title: What AI needs to accelerate the way humans innovate
item.description: In graduate school, my experimental archaeology professor told a student to create a door socket—the hole in a door frame that a bolt slides into—in a...

item.title: Want Your Kids to Be Emotionally Healthy? Science Says Get Their Grandparents Involved
item.description: Research shows grandparents ‘have a positive influence distinct from the parent-child relationship.’

item.title: Boards aren’t ready for the AI age: What happens when your CEO gets deepfaked?
item.description: Deepfake attacks have moved from cyber briefings to boardroom emergencies with every CEO likeness a potential vulnerability. Most companies have no pl...

item.title: If you want to start a freelance business, here are the exact first steps
item.description: There’s a saying: you can’t control the world, but you can control yourself. This perspective is critical when navigating an uncertain economy. I lear...

item.title: Dow futures now down over 800 points ahead of the open
MongoDB's stock sinks after earnings, signaling more woes for software sector
The smartest money moves to make as the Iran conflict rattles markets
South Korean stocks slump as hot market re-opens after attack on Iran
HBO Max, Paramount+ will become one streaming service. What that means for you.
